description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a predominantly yellow body accented by white stripes and black components. The receiver and barrel are streamlined, with subtle venting and a cylindrical muzzle at the front. The stock is minimalistic, appearing as a black skeletal frame integrated into the rear of the weapon. A small sight or rail is mounted on top, and the trigger area is enclosed by a compact, rounded guard. The overall design is utilitarian, with clean lines and a robust, industrial appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A yellow, modern shotgun with black accents, a minimal stock, and a compact, streamlined design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and narrow profile, with the yellow barrel and black stock visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the yellow barrel, white stripes, venting, and the black skeletal stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the black stock and the narrow, elongated body of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing similar features to view 1, with the sight/rail and white stripes visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: compact, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
